Pros

Very cheap, good kiting potential, easy to play

Cons

Low burst, outscaled by expensive builds, predictable

Basic Combo

Q (slow) -> auto attacks -> W (damage) -> E (escape)

Strong Against

Melee builds, open world PvE

Weak Against

One-shot builds, mobile assassins

Notes

The cheapest viable build for mists. Focus on positioning and kiting.

Albion Online changes constantly. Check the date of the last update before investing silver in this build.
